Hero.description: Transforming complex business logic with modern tech stacks, focusing on clean architecture and interactions. Advocating technical minimalism, delivering core value with the leanest code.

ecommerce.title: Enterprise B2B E-commerce Platform
ecommerce.description: A high-performance admin dashboard built from scratch, handling millions of SKU data. Designed with micro-frontend architecture, optimizing complex form rendering and state flow.

dataviz.title: Financial Data Visualization
dataviz.description: Real-time monitoring dashboard built with Canvas & WebGL, ensuring silky smooth 60fps rendering.

devflow.title: DevFlow API Platform
devflow.description: API documentation and debugging tool for developers, featuring a minimalist split-pane layout with fluid IDE-like editing experience.

uilib.title: UI Component Library
uilib.description: Open-source headless component library focused on accessibility (a11y) and keyboard interaction, adopted by over 50 internal projects.

Contact.heading: Get in Touch
Contact.description: If you have a collaboration inquiry or any questions, feel free to reach out. I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
